name: Gored Gored (ጎረድ ጎረድ)
description: Large cubes of raw beef served with awaze dipping sauce

name: Special Kitfo (ስፔሻል ክትፎ)
description: Premium kitfo with extra niter kibbeh, mitmita and cottage cheese on the side

name: Tibs (ጥብስ)
description: Sautéed beef with onions, jalapeños, tomatoes and rosemary

name: Zilzil Tibs (ዝልዝል ጥብስ)
description: Thinly sliced beef strips sautéed with garlic and peppers
